vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inaccurate regarding the current state of the biome. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/bare soil. P2 (Mexican Mint) and P4 (Silver Guest) are indistinguishable or lost. P3 (Pothos) is the only identifiable specimen.

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty. Soil appears dark and undisturbed.
plant_audit.P2_Black_Pot: Contains a single, struggling, chlorotic leaf structure. No evidence of Mexican Mint or Silver Guest.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: Pothos specimen is present. Shows signs of severe dehydration and potential necrosis.
plant_audit.P4_Shared: Merged into P2/P3 space; no distinct specimen identified.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently damp/dark; no signs of surface cracking.
biome_observations.debris: Significant presence of crushed eggshells in the P3/P4 pot area. Electronic component (IC/chip) present on the desk surface in later images.

temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-1: Gradual loss of structural integrity in the P3 leaf. The electronic component (IC) appears on the desk surface at T-4 and remains through current.
temporal_deltas.Current: The P3 leaf shows signs of further drooping and potential yellowing/necrosis compared to the earliest image.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of decline. The Pothos (P3) is the only surviving plant, and it exhibits signs of physiological stress (wilting, loss of turgor). The other pots are effectively barren, suggesting a failure of the initial planting or severe mortality.
anomalies: Introduction of crushed eggshells as a soil amendment/top dressing.
Introduction of an electronic component (IC) on the desk surface.
Missing specimens P1, P2, and P4.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a struggling indoor biome. While the Pothos (P3) remains, it is in poor health. The yellow pot (P1) is empty, and the other pots contain no identifiable specimens from the registry. The presence of eggshells suggests an attempt at nutrient supplementation, but the lack of plant growth indicates a failure to thrive. The desk environment is cluttered with non-botanical debris (IC chip).
